name: Custom Cakes
desc: Each cake is made with real, high-quality ingredients and made to your specifications. Popular cake flavors and frosting options are listed below, but every cake can be customized to create the perfect cake for your celebration.

name: Cupcakes
desc: Each cupcake is baked fresh with real, high-quality ingredients and finished by hand. Popular flavor and frosting combinations are listed below, but every batch can be customized to fit your celebration. Cupcakes are sold by the dozen, with mix-and-match flavors available upon request.

name: Chocolate Ganache
desc: A rich, silky ganache made with real chocolate and cream, perfect as a standalone treat or the finishing touch to any dessert table.

name: Lemon Squares
desc: Bright, tangy lemon curd sits atop a buttery shortbread crust for a treat that's equal parts sweet and citrusy. Sold by the dozen, these are a refreshing addition to any dessert spread.

name: Gourmet Cookies
desc: Sold by the dozen, these gourmet cookies are baked with real, high-quality ingredients and loaded with mix-ins. With flavors ranging from classic to creative, there's a combination to suit every craving.

name: Bundt Cakes
desc: A dense, rich bundt cake baked from scratch and available in a range of flavors, from classic vanilla to bold whiskey cake. Each one can be finished with a glaze topping for an extra touch of sweetness.

name: Full Cheesecake
desc: A creamy, made-from-scratch cheesecake with your choice of crust and flavor, finished with a topping or glaze if desired. Perfect for sharing at any celebration.

name: Mini Cheesecakes
desc: Individually portioned cheesecakes made with real, high-quality ingredients and topped with your choice of flavor. Their bite-sized format makes them an easy addition to any dessert table.

name: Chocolate Covered Strawberries
desc: Fresh strawberries hand-dipped in rich chocolate for a simple, elegant treat. Sold by the dozen, they're a classic addition to any celebration.

name: Cannoli
desc: Crisp, hand-filled cannoli shells packed with a creamy chocolate chip filling and finished with a crumbled pistachio topping. Sold by the dozen, these are made fresh to order.

flavors: Chocolate Chip with Pistachio Crumbled Topping

name: Mousse Cups
desc: Light, airy mousse layered in individual cups and available in a variety of fruity and chocolate flavors. Sold by the dozen, they make an elegant, no-fuss dessert option for any event.

name: Pumpkin Squares
desc: A dense, spiced pumpkin bar topped with a smooth cream cheese frosting. Sold by the dozen, these are a seasonal favorite that pairs well with any fall celebration.

name: Biscotti
desc: Crunchy biscotti available in a variety of flavors, dipped and drizzled with chocolate. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Pecan Pie
desc: A classic pecan pie made with real, high-quality ingredients, baked to a golden finish with a rich, decadent filling.

name: Banana Bread Muffins
desc: Soft banana bread baked in individual muffin form for an easy grab-and-go treat. These come sold by the dozen and are made with real, ripe bananas.

name: Chocolate Covered Pretzel Rods
desc: Crunchy pretzel rods dipped in rich chocolate and finished with your choice of drizzle or toppings. Sold by the dozen, they offer the perfect balance of sweet and salty.

name: Gluten Free Brownies
desc: Fudgy, rich brownies made without gluten so everyone can enjoy them. Sold by the dozen, they're made with real, high-quality ingredients without sacrificing flavor.

name: Toffee “Crack”
desc: A buttery, crunchy toffee layered with chocolate and topped with your choice of add-ins. Addictively good, this treat lives up to its name.

name: Red Velvet Cake Truffles
desc: Bite-sized red velvet cake balls rolled in a smooth coating for a rich, indulgent treat. Sold by the dozen, they're an easy, elegant addition to any dessert spread.
